identity.name: Space Groove Arcade
identity.core_metaphor: A neon-soaked dance floor in zero gravity

usage.h1: text-4xl md:text-6xl font-black tracking-widest uppercase text-transparent bg-clip-text bg-gradient-to-r from-primary via-secondary to-primary animate-text-shimmer

layout_strategy.global: Mobile-first, Portrait optimized. Max-width 480px centered on desktop for arcade feel.
layout_strategy.grid_system: Single column flex for mobile. Bento-style grid for menu selection.

buttons.primary: relative overflow-hidden rounded-none skew-x-[-10deg] bg-neon-pink text-black font-black uppercase tracking-widest hover:bg-white transition-all duration-200 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(255,113,206,0.5)] active:scale-95 px-8 py-4 clip-path-polygon
buttons.secondary: border-2 border-cyan-pop text-cyan-pop rounded-none skew-x-[-10deg] font-bold hover:bg-cyan-pop/10 transition-all uppercase tracking-wider px-6 py-3

cards.game_select: group relative h-48 w-full overflow-hidden rounded-xl border border-white/10 bg-deep-purple/50 transition-all hover:border-cyan-pop/50 hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(1,205,254,0.2)]
cards.leaderboard_row: flex items-center justify-between p-4 border-b border-white/5 hover:bg-white/5 transition-colors

inputs.default: bg-black/50 border border-white/20 rounded-lg p-4 text-white placeholder-gray-500 focus:border-neon-pink focus:ring-1 focus:ring-neon-pink transition-all outline-none font-body

motion.guidelines: High energy, bouncy, and swift. Avoid slow fades.

images.description: Neon Grid - Use for Main Menu Background with overlay
Purple/Green Abstract - Use for Game Over / Success screens

ui.score_display: font-accent text-yellow-400 text-2xl top-8 right-8 absolute drop-shadow-[0_2px_2px_rgba(0,0,0,0.8)]
ui.controls_hint: animate-pulse text-white/50 text-sm bottom-20 absolute w-full text-center

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. THEME SETUP: Immediately update index.css to include the Google Fonts imports and define the CSS variables for the 'dark' theme using the palette provided.
2. TAILWIND CONFIG: Extend the tailwind.config.js with the custom colors (neon-pink, cyan-pop, etc.) and fonts (Orbitron, Rajdhani).

3. LAYOUT: Build the 'Home' page as a vertical stack of 3 Game Cards. 'Groove Orbit Runner' should be the Active/Highlighted one. The other two can be 'Locked' or 'Coming Soon' visual states if not implemented, but the prompt says 'Selection interface for 3 games', so make them clickable.
4. GAME CANVAS: The Phaser game must be mounted in a container that takes 100% height and width of the mobile viewport. Ensure 'touch-action: none' is applied to prevent scrolling while playing.
5. SCORE SUBMISSION: The Game Over screen must be a Modal Overlay (Glassmorphism) over the frozen game canvas. It needs a big 'Score' display, an input for 'Name', and a 'Submit' button.
6. LEADERBOARD: A simple, elegant list. Highlight the top 3 scores with Gold/Silver/Bronze text colors.
7. PERFORMANCE: Ensure the Phaser instance is destroyed properly when unmounting components to prevent memory leaks.
8. ACCESSIBILITY: All buttons must have aria-labels. Color contrast is high by default with this palette, but ensure text size is readable.
universal_guidelines: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
